message:
feat(tests): expand integration test coverage across coevolution, counterfactual, serde, security epoch, and cross-arch matrix

Adds substantial test depth to five integration test suites:

- adversarial_coevolution_harness: +1473 lines of coevolution strategy
  interaction, mutation operator, and convergence property tests
- counterfactual_intervention_planner: +1414 lines of intervention plan
  generation, constraint propagation, and rollback semantics tests
- deterministic_serde: +1003 lines of round-trip serialization invariant
  tests across all engine data types with fuzzy and edge-case inputs
- security_epoch: +1326 lines of epoch transition, key rotation, and
  revocation policy enforcement tests
- parser_cross_arch_repro_matrix: +12 lines extending matrix lane
  validation edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
